original: power-armored goo-girl
the
The

She’s wearing a hulking, ape-like powered exoskeleton that’s been kitted up with heavy armor plates and extra motivators that have turned an object of common labor into an improvised machine of war. A bulky backpack slung on the suit’s back is hooked up to a long two-pronged mass driver that crackles with electricity.\n\nThe goo-girl inside is completely obscured by her black-armored suit, save for her eyes under the visor in her face plate.
The heavy armor somehow trundles aside!
a railgun
hull plates
Luckily, you’re able to dodge the worst of the blast!
The debris knocks you out of the air!
You fumble your landing and eat dirt--you have been tripped!
You manage to duck and weave between the rapid kicks, avoiding her attack!
One kick hits you, sending you stumbling back!
Both of the kicks hit you, sending you stumbling back!
You just manage to sidestep the attack, letting the pilot crash into the wall behind you!
The suit’s head cracks into you with devastating force, throwing you backwards!
The force of the impact leaves you skidding across the floor on your [pc.butt], tripped for a moment!

She bunkers up again, and then comes running right at you! You try and scramble back, but it’s no use: the power-armored goo-girl throws herself into the air and comes down right on you with the suit’s plated elbow. The ground under you cracks open with the impact, and the sound of your pained cry echoes down the tunnels."+({var0}()?" The slaves nearby all cheer uproariously. Roz takes to her feet and pumps a mechanized fist in the air with a triumphant laugh.":"")
